examples: SATEC series 300 LX, featuring an Automatic Extensometer and Pneumatic Grips, and 3300 series testers.
The linearity of a large range extensometer is a critical problem, because its elastic'element is under large deformation.
In design of large range extensometer whose range is 100% strain, according to theory formulas and factual technics, using MATLAB to optimize the structure and size.
